text:
The file **IEC_Context.md** is in your Downloads/IEC folder. You can access it by:

**Option 1: Open directly**
- Go to your file explorer
- Navigate to `/home/bot4u/Downloads/IEC/`
- Open `IEC_Context.md` with any text editor (like VS Code, Notepad, or any markdown viewer)

**Option 2: Just ask me**
- You don't need to open it yourself
- Whenever you ask me an electronics question, I'll automatically refer to this file
- I'll provide answers based on your course material

So you can just start asking your electronics questions and I'll use the context file to give you syllabus-aligned answers!
